calendar.matters:
Prove-Up Hearing As To Deft Western Macarthur By Plft Anthony Dominick (Asbestos)
Off Calendar Apr-05-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: CHRIS ANDREAS, Esq. of Brayton-Purcell, 415/898-1555 on behalf of plaintiff(s). No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff ANTHONY DOMINICK, SR. and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $276,200.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court was made. The Court took matter Under Submission as of Apr-04-2002 by ALFRED G. CHIANTELLI. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: M. TORREANO, #8600 (503)
